[[File:Light ballista (Last Man Standing) detail.png|left|200px]]

The '''light ballista''' from [[Last Man Standing]] is a minigame-exclusive variant of the normal [[light ballista]]. It can be obtained from opening [[Chest (Last Man Standing)|chests]] with a [[bloody key]] or [[bloodier key]], or by looting the [[Crate (Last Man Standing)|crates]] that spawn at random locations on the map. On death, it is dropped to the player who killed you.

==Special attack==
[[File:Concentrated Shot (light ballista).gif|thumb|250px|A player performing the light ballista's special attack, ''Concentrated Shot''.]]
The light ballista has a [[special attack]], ''Concentrated Shot'', which it shares with the [[heavy ballista]]. It performs an attack with 25% increased accuracy and damage and uses 65% of the player's special attack energy.

==Trivia==
*The special attack tooltip stating that it has a 2.4 second delay to attack is false; there is no extra delay associated with the special attack.
